content.fact_text: OrderStateManager implementation for coordinating order lifecycle state transitions with ACID compliance and event-driven architecture.

provenance_data.behaviour: Orchestrates order state transitions using distributed locking, database transactions, and event publication. Enforces state machine rules and circuit breaking.
interfaces: transitionOrder(orderId: string, targetStatus: OrderStatus, metadata?: { tracking_number?: string }): Promise<OrderModel>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a thread-safe, resilient, and atomic mechanism for managing the ecommerce order lifecycle, ensuring data integrity across distributed system components.
